title: Claude Learning Roadmap
description: A complete, staged path from beginner to expert with Anthropic's Claude — foundations and models, the claude.ai apps, prompt engineering, the Claude API, context and tokens, tool use, vision and documents, extended thinking, the Model Context Protocol, agents, Claude Code, evaluation, safety, production deployment and the ecosystem.
